--
-- Name: pm_mv_process_variant_paths; Type: MATERIALIZED VIEW; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW automation.pm_mv_process_variant_paths AS
 WITH ordered_stages AS (
         SELECT el.organization_id,
            el.esm_instance_id,
            el.entity_id,
            el.entity_schema,
            el.entity_type,
            el.to_stage_id AS stage_id,
            el.to_stage_category AS stage_category,
            el.created_at,
            row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY el.esm_instance_id ORDER BY el.created_at) AS step_number
           FROM automation.esm_logs el
          WHERE ((el.to_stage_id IS NOT NULL) AND (el.transition_type = ANY (ARRAY['entry'::text, 'transition'::text])))
        ), instance_paths AS (
         SELECT os.organization_id,
            os.esm_instance_id,
            os.entity_id,
            os.entity_schema,
            os.entity_type,
            array_agg(os.stage_id ORDER BY os.step_number) AS stage_path,
            array_agg(os.stage_category ORDER BY os.step_number) AS category_path,
            count(*) AS step_count,
            min(os.created_at) AS started_at,
            max(os.created_at) AS last_transition_at,
            (EXTRACT(epoch FROM (max(os.created_at) - min(os.created_at))) * (1000)::numeric) AS total_duration_ms
           FROM ordered_stages os
          GROUP BY os.organization_id, os.esm_instance_id, os.entity_id, os.entity_schema, os.entity_type
        )
 SELECT organization_id,
    entity_schema,
    entity_type,
    array_to_string(stage_path, '→'::text) AS variant_key,
    stage_path,
    category_path,
    step_count,
    esm_instance_id,
    entity_id,
    started_at,
    last_transition_at,
    total_duration_ms,
    (category_path[array_length(category_path, 1)] = ANY (ARRAY['CLOSED_WON'::text, 'CLOSED_LOST'::text, 'CANCELLED'::text])) AS is_completed
   FROM instance_paths ip
  WITH NO DATA;


--
-- Name: MATERIALIZED VIEW pm_mv_process_variant_paths; Type: COMMENT; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

COMMENT ON MATERIALIZED VIEW automation.pm_mv_process_variant_paths IS 'Pre-computed process variant paths from esm_logs. Each row = one entity journey through the state machine. Refresh with: REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY automation.pm_mv_process_variant_paths;';


--
-- Name: pm_mv_stage_dwell_times; Type: MATERIALIZED VIEW; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW automation.pm_mv_stage_dwell_times AS
 WITH stage_entries AS (
         SELECT el.organization_id,
            el.esm_instance_id,
            el.entity_id,
            el.entity_schema,
            el.entity_type,
            el.to_stage_id AS stage_id,
            el.to_stage_category AS stage_category,
            el.created_at AS entered_at,
            lead(el.created_at) OVER (PARTITION BY el.esm_instance_id ORDER BY el.created_at) AS exited_at
           FROM automation.esm_logs el
          WHERE ((el.transition_type = ANY (ARRAY['entry'::text, 'transition'::text])) AND (el.to_stage_id IS NOT NULL))
        )
 SELECT organization_id,
    entity_schema,
    entity_type,
    stage_id,
    stage_category,
    esm_instance_id,
    entity_id,
    entered_at,
    exited_at,
    (EXTRACT(epoch FROM (exited_at - entered_at)) * (1000)::numeric) AS dwell_ms,
    (EXTRACT(epoch FROM (exited_at - entered_at)) / (3600)::numeric) AS dwell_hours,
    (exited_at IS NULL) AS is_current
   FROM stage_entries se
  WITH NO DATA;


--
-- Name: MATERIALIZED VIEW pm_mv_stage_dwell_times; Type: COMMENT; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

COMMENT ON MATERIALIZED VIEW automation.pm_mv_stage_dwell_times IS 'Pre-computed stage dwell times from esm_logs. Refresh with: REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY automation.pm_mv_stage_dwell_times;';


--
-- Name: sla_breaches; Type: TABLE; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

CREATE TABLE automation.sla_breaches (
    id uuid DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() NOT NULL,
    organization_id uuid NOT NULL,
    esm_instance_id uuid NOT NULL,
    sla_rule_id text NOT NULL,
    sla_rule_name text,
    breached_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
    acknowledged_at timestamp with time zone,
    acknowledged_by uuid,
    metadata jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
    resolution_status text DEFAULT 'pending'::text,
    resolved_at timestamp with time zone,
    violation_duration_hours numeric(10,2),
    CONSTRAINT sla_breaches_resolution_status_check CHECK ((resolution_status = ANY (ARRAY['pending'::text, 'acknowledged'::text, 'resolved'::text, 'escalated'::text])))
);

ALTER TABLE ONLY automation.sla_breaches FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;


--
-- Name: TABLE sla_breaches; Type: COMMENT; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

COMMENT ON TABLE automation.sla_breaches IS 'Logs occurrences of SLA breaches detected by scheduled jobs.';


--
-- Name: COLUMN sla_breaches.metadata; Type: COMMENT; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

COMMENT ON COLUMN automation.sla_breaches.metadata IS 'Links this breach log back to the source blueprint and version.';


--
-- Name: COLUMN sla_breaches.resolution_status; Type: COMMENT; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

COMMENT ON COLUMN automation.sla_breaches.resolution_status IS 'Lifecycle: pending (new breach) → acknowledged (seen) → resolved (fixed) / escalated (auto-escalated)';


--
-- Name: COLUMN sla_breaches.violation_duration_hours; Type: COMMENT; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

COMMENT ON COLUMN automation.sla_breaches.violation_duration_hours IS 'Set when resolved: EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (resolved_at - breached_at)) / 3600. For unresolved, compute at query time with NOW().';


--
-- Name: pm_mv_process_dashboard; Type: MATERIALIZED VIEW; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW automation.pm_mv_process_dashboard AS
 WITH active_instances AS (
         SELECT ei.organization_id,
            ei.entity_schema,
            ei.entity_type,
            bi.blueprint_id,
            count(*) AS active_count,
            count(*) FILTER (WHERE (ei.stage_category = 'NEW'::text)) AS in_new,
            count(*) FILTER (WHERE (ei.stage_category = 'IN_PROGRESS'::text)) AS in_progress,
            count(*) FILTER (WHERE (ei.stage_category = ANY (ARRAY['CLOSED_WON'::text, 'CLOSED_LOST'::text, 'CANCELLED'::text]))) AS completed
           FROM (automation.esm_instances ei
             JOIN automation.bp_instances bi ON (((bi.entity_id = ei.entity_id) AND (bi.entity_schema = ei.entity_schema) AND (bi.entity_type = ei.entity_type) AND (bi.status = 'ACTIVE'::text))))
          GROUP BY ei.organization_id, ei.entity_schema, ei.entity_type, bi.blueprint_id
        ), dwell_stats AS (
         SELECT dw.organization_id,
            dw.entity_schema,
            dw.entity_type,
            dw.stage_id,
            count(*) AS transition_count,
            avg(dw.dwell_ms) AS avg_dwell_ms,
            percentile_cont((0.5)::double precision) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ((dw.dwell_ms)::double precision)) AS median_dwell_ms,
            percentile_cont((0.95)::double precision) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ((dw.dwell_ms)::double precision)) AS p95_dwell_ms,
            max(dw.dwell_ms) AS max_dwell_ms
           FROM automation.pm_mv_stage_dwell_times dw
          WHERE ((dw.dwell_ms IS NOT NULL) AND (dw.entered_at > (now() - '30 days'::interval)))
          GROUP BY dw.organization_id, dw.entity_schema, dw.entity_type, dw.stage_id
        ), variant_stats AS (
         SELECT vp.organization_id,
            vp.entity_schema,
            vp.entity_type,
            vp.variant_key,
            count(*) AS variant_count,
            avg(vp.total_duration_ms) AS avg_cycle_ms
           FROM automation.pm_mv_process_variant_paths vp
          WHERE (vp.started_at > (now() - '30 days'::interval))
          GROUP BY vp.organization_id, vp.entity_schema, vp.entity_type, vp.variant_key
        ), sla_stats AS (
         SELECT sb.organization_id,
            el.entity_schema,
            el.entity_type,
            count(*) AS breach_count_30d,
            count(*) FILTER (WHERE (sb.resolution_status = 'resolved'::text)) AS resolved_count,
            count(*) FILTER (WHERE (sb.resolution_status = 'pending'::text)) AS pending_count
           FROM ((automation.sla_breaches sb
             JOIN automation.esm_instances ei ON ((ei.id = sb.esm_instance_id)))
             LEFT JOIN automation.esm_logs el ON ((el.esm_instance_id = ei.id)))
          WHERE (sb.breached_at > (now() - '30 days'::interval))
          GROUP BY sb.organization_id, el.entity_schema, el.entity_type
        )
 SELECT ai.organization_id,
    ai.entity_schema,
    ai.entity_type,
    ai.blueprint_id,
    ai.active_count,
    ai.in_new,
    ai.in_progress,
    ai.completed,
    ( SELECT ds.stage_id
           FROM dwell_stats ds
          WHERE ((ds.organization_id = ai.organization_id) AND (ds.entity_schema = ai.entity_schema) AND (ds.entity_type = ai.entity_type))
          ORDER BY ds.avg_dwell_ms DESC
         LIMIT 1) AS bottleneck_stage,
    ( SELECT ds.avg_dwell_ms
           FROM dwell_stats ds
          WHERE ((ds.organization_id = ai.organization_id) AND (ds.entity_schema = ai.entity_schema) AND (ds.entity_type = ai.entity_type))
          ORDER BY ds.avg_dwell_ms DESC
         LIMIT 1) AS bottleneck_avg_dwell_ms,
    ( SELECT vs.variant_key
           FROM variant_stats vs
          WHERE ((vs.organization_id = ai.organization_id) AND (vs.entity_schema = ai.entity_schema) AND (vs.entity_type = ai.entity_type))
          ORDER BY vs.variant_count DESC
         LIMIT 1) AS most_common_path,
    ( SELECT vs.variant_count
           FROM variant_stats vs
          WHERE ((vs.organization_id = ai.organization_id) AND (vs.entity_schema = ai.entity_schema) AND (vs.entity_type = ai.entity_type))
          ORDER BY vs.variant_count DESC
         LIMIT 1) AS most_common_path_count,
    COALESCE(ss.breach_count_30d, (0)::bigint) AS sla_breaches_30d,
    COALESCE(ss.pending_count, (0)::bigint) AS sla_pending_30d,
    now() AS refreshed_at
   FROM (active_instances ai
     LEFT JOIN sla_stats ss ON (((ss.organization_id = ai.organization_id) AND (ss.entity_schema = ai.entity_schema) AND (ss.entity_type = ai.entity_type))))
  WITH NO DATA;


--
-- Name: MATERIALIZED VIEW pm_mv_process_dashboard; Type: COMMENT; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

COMMENT ON MATERIALIZED VIEW automation.pm_mv_process_dashboard IS 'Aggregated process dashboard: instance counts, bottleneck stages, common paths, SLA stats. Refresh with: REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY automation.pm_mv_process_dashboard;';

    id uuid DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() NOT NULL,

    source_type text DEFAULT 'process_mining'::text NOT NULL,

    proposed_state jsonb,
    predicted_impact jsonb,
    simulation_results jsonb,
    experiment_id uuid,
    detected_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(),
    reviewed_by uuid,
    reviewed_at timestamp with time zone,
    approved_by uuid,
    approved_at timestamp with time zone,
    deployed_at timestamp with time zone,
    rolled_back_at timestamp with time zone,
    rejection_reason text,
    actual_impact jsonb,
    created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT pm_optimization_suggestions_source_type_check CHECK ((source_type = ANY (ARRAY['process_mining'::text, 'anomaly_detection'::text, 'sla_analysis'::text, 'manual'::text]))),
    CONSTRAINT pm_optimization_suggestions_status_check CHECK ((status = ANY (ARRAY['detected'::text, 'simulated'::text, 'ready_for_review'::text, 'approved'::text, 'rejected'::text, 'deployed'::text, 'monitoring'::text, 'rolled_back'::text]))),
    CONSTRAINT pm_optimization_suggestions_suggestion_type_check CHECK ((suggestion_type = ANY (ARRAY['stage_optimization'::text, 'sla_adjustment'::text, 'parallelization'::text, 'automation_addition'::text, 'resource_reallocation'::text, 'blueprint_version'::text])))
);

--
-- Name: pm_vw_sla_breach_analytics; Type: VIEW; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

CREATE VIEW automation.pm_vw_sla_breach_analytics AS
 SELECT id,
    organization_id,
    esm_instance_id,
    sla_rule_id,
    sla_rule_name,
    breached_at AS detected_at,
    resolution_status,
    resolved_at,
        CASE
            WHEN (resolved_at IS NOT NULL) THEN violation_duration_hours
            ELSE (EXTRACT(epoch FROM (now() - breached_at)) / (3600)::numeric)
        END AS current_duration_hours,
    acknowledged_at,
    acknowledged_by,
    metadata,
    created_at
   FROM automation.sla_breaches;


--
-- Name: VIEW pm_vw_sla_breach_analytics; Type: COMMENT; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

COMMENT ON VIEW automation.pm_vw_sla_breach_analytics IS 'SLA breach analytics with live-computed duration. For resolved breaches uses stored value; for unresolved computes from NOW().';


--
-- Name: pm_vw_stage_dwell_summary; Type: VIEW; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

CREATE VIEW automation.pm_vw_stage_dwell_summary AS
 SELECT el_entry.organization_id,
    el_entry.entity_schema,
    el_entry.entity_type,
    el_entry.to_stage_id AS stage_id,
    el_entry.to_stage_category AS stage_category,
    count(*) AS entry_count,
    avg((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (el_exit.created_at - el_entry.created_at)) * (1000)::numeric)) AS avg_dwell_ms,
    (percentile_cont((0.5)::double precision) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (el_exit.created_at - el_entry.created_at)))::double precision)) * (1000)::double precision) AS median_dwell_ms,
    (percentile_cont((0.95)::double precision) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (el_exit.created_at - el_entry.created_at)))::double precision)) * (1000)::double precision) AS p95_dwell_ms
   FROM (automation.esm_logs el_entry
     JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT el2.created_at
           FROM automation.esm_logs el2
          WHERE ((el2.esm_instance_id = el_entry.esm_instance_id) AND (el2.created_at > el_entry.created_at))
          ORDER BY el2.created_at
         LIMIT 1) el_exit ON (true))
  WHERE ((el_entry.to_stage_id IS NOT NULL) AND (el_entry.created_at > (now() - '30 days'::interval)))
  GROUP BY el_entry.organization_id, el_entry.entity_schema, el_entry.entity_type, el_entry.to_stage_id, el_entry.to_stage_category;


--
-- Name: VIEW pm_vw_stage_dwell_summary; Type: COMMENT; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

COMMENT ON VIEW automation.pm_vw_stage_dwell_summary IS 'Live (non-materialized) stage dwell time summary. Last 30 days. Use for ad-hoc queries; use pm_mv_stage_dwell_times for dashboards.';

--

--
-- Name: COLUMN telemetry_log.trace_id; Type: COMMENT; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

COMMENT ON COLUMN automation.telemetry_log.trace_id IS 'Shared UUID = entity record ID (e.g. leave_application.id = bp_instance.id = esm_instance.id = telemetry trace_id).';


--
-- Name: COLUMN telemetry_log.events; Type: COMMENT; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

COMMENT ON COLUMN automation.telemetry_log.events IS 'Ordered JSONB array of decision points: [{name, ts, attrs}, ...]. Replaces scattered ut_debug_logs INSERTs.
-- Single wide table, OTEL-compatible column naming.
-- One row per function execution (not per debug step).
-- All intermediate decision points stored in events[] JSONB array.
-- KEY DESIGN: trace_id = entitys shared UUID (NEW.id).
-- This means: WHERE trace_id = <leave_application_id> returns the full
-- lifecycle of that record across all automation functions.
-- No separate entity_id column needed — trace_id IS the entity ID.';

--
-- Name: wf_rules; Type: TABLE; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

CREATE TABLE automation.wf_rules (
    id uuid DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() NOT NULL,
    organization_id uuid,
    name text NOT NULL,
    description text,
    trigger_schema text,
    trigger_table text,
    trigger_type text NOT NULL,
    condition_type text DEFAULT 'jsonb'::text,
    conditions jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
    version integer NOT NULL,
    is_active boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
    priority integer DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    metadata jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
    created_by uuid,
    last_executed_at timestamp with time zone,
    error_notification_config jsonb,
    blueprint_id uuid,
    conditions__monitored_stages text[] GENERATED ALWAYS AS (NULLIF(core.met_util_cast_jsonb_array((conditions #> '{monitored_stages}'::text[])), ARRAY[]::text[])) STORED,
    metadata__blueprint_name text GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((metadata #>> '{blueprint_name}'::text[])) STORED,
    search_vector tsvector GENERATED ALWAYS AS (setweight(to_tsvector('simple'::regconfig, ((((((COALESCE(name, ''::text) || ' '::text) || COALESCE(description, ''::text)) || ' '::text) || COALESCE(((conditions #> '{monitored_stages}'::text[]))::text, ''::text)) || ' '::text) || COALESCE((metadata #>> '{blueprint_name}'::text[]), ''::text))), 'A'::"char")) STORED,
    CONSTRAINT wf_rules_condition_type_check CHECK ((condition_type = ANY (ARRAY['jsonb'::text, 'sql'::text])))
);

ALTER TABLE ONLY automation.wf_rules FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;


--
-- Name: TABLE wf_rules; Type: COMMENT; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

COMMENT ON TABLE automation.wf_rules IS 'Compiled automation rules (workflows), generated from process blueprints. Defines WHEN actions should run.';


--
-- Name: COLUMN wf_rules.is_active; Type: COMMENT; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

COMMENT ON COLUMN automation.wf_rules.is_active IS 'Controlled by the activation status of the parent blueprint version.';


--
-- Name: COLUMN wf_rules.metadata; Type: COMMENT; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

COMMENT ON COLUMN automation.wf_rules.metadata IS 'Links this compiled rule back to its source blueprint, version, and specific listener (e.g., on_stage_entry.Scheduled).';


--
-- Name: v_wf_rules; Type: VIEW; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

CREATE VIEW automation.v_wf_rules AS
 SELECT t.id,
    t.organization_id,
    fk_organization.name AS organization,
    t.name,
    t.description,
    t.trigger_schema,
    t.trigger_table,
    t.trigger_type,
    t.condition_type,
    (t.conditions #>> '{type}'::text[]) AS conditions__type,
    (t.conditions #>> '{sla_rule_id}'::text[]) AS conditions__sla_rule_id,
    (t.conditions #>> '{base_type}'::text[]) AS conditions__base_conditions__type,
    t.conditions__monitored_stages,
    (t.conditions #>> '{time_threshold_hours}'::text[]) AS conditions__time_threshold_hours,
    t.conditions,
    t.version,
    t.is_active,
    t.priority,
    t.metadata__blueprint_name,
    (t.metadata #>> '{blueprint_type}'::text[]) AS metadata__blueprint_type,
    ((t.metadata #>> '{blueprint_version}'::text[]))::integer AS metadata__blueprint_version,
    (t.metadata #>> '{esm_definition_id}'::text[]) AS metadata__esm_definition_id,
    (t.metadata #>> '{blueprint_listener_id}'::text[]) AS metadata__blueprint_listener_id,
    (t.metadata #>> '{blueprint_sla_rule_id}'::text[]) AS metadata__blueprint_sla_rule_id,
    ((t.metadata #>> '{target_escalation_level}'::text[]))::integer AS metadata__target_escalation_level,
    t.metadata,
    t.created_at,
    t.updated_at,
    t.created_by,
    t.last_executed_at,
    t.error_notification_config,
    t.blueprint_id,
    fk_blueprint.name AS blueprint,
    t.search_vector
   FROM ((automation.wf_rules t
     LEFT JOIN identity.organizations fk_organization ON ((t.organization_id = fk_organization.id)))
     LEFT JOIN automation.bp_process_blueprints fk_blueprint ON ((t.blueprint_id = fk_blueprint.id)));

    updated_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
    last_executed_at timestamp with time zone,

--
-- Name: x_bp_process_blueprints_duplicate_M25; Type: TABLE; Schema: automation; Owner: -
--

CREATE TABLE automation."x_bp_process_blueprints_duplicate_M25" (
    id uuid DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() NOT NULL,
    organization_id uuid,
    name text NOT NULL,
    description text,
    entity_schema text NOT NULL,
    entity_type text NOT NULL,
    definition jsonb NOT NULL,
    version integer DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    is_active boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
    metadata jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
    created_by uuid,
    updated_by uuid,
    blueprint_type text DEFAULT 'lifecycle'::text NOT NULL,
    intent text,
    partition_filter text,
    CONSTRAINT bp_process_blueprints_blueprint_type_check CHECK ((blueprint_type = ANY (ARRAY['lifecycle'::text, 'approval'::text, 'orchestration'::text, 'agentic'::text]))),
    CONSTRAINT valid_blueprint_definition CHECK (public.jsonb_matches_schema('{
            "type": "object",
            "required": ["name", "entity_schema", "entity_type", "blueprint_type", "lifecycle"],
            "properties": {
                "name": {"type": "string"},
                "entity_schema": {"type": "string"},
                "entity_type": {"type": "string"},
                "blueprint_type": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": ["lifecycle", "approval", "orchestration", "agentic"]
                },
                "lifecycle": {
                    "type": "object",
                    "required": ["startStateId", "stages"],
                    "properties": {
                        "startStateId": {"type": "string"},
                        "stages": {
                            "type": "array",
                            "minItems": 1,
                            "items": {
                                "type": "object",
                                "required": ["id", "name", "category"],
                                "properties": {
                                    "id": {"type": "string"},
                                    "name": {"type": "string"},
                                    "category": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "enum": ["NEW", "IN_PROGRESS", "CLOSED_WON", "CLOSED_LOST", "CANCELLED"]
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }'::json, definition))
);
